description_long: This object is a rectangular, wall-mounted air conditioner unit with a clean, minimalist design. The front face features a subtle brand logo at the center and a large intake or output grille composed of evenly spaced rectangular slats. The top surface is dominated by a grid of rectangular vents, likely for air intake or exhaust, providing efficient airflow. The sides are smooth and slightly curved, with a small, recessed panel or cover visible on the lower right corner, possibly for maintenance or controls. The overall color is a uniform light gray or white, giving it a modern and unobtrusive appearance suitable for urban environments. The construction appears to be primarily metal or high-quality plastic, with internal components likely including metal coils and fans.
description: A sleek, rectangular wall-mounted air conditioner with a large vented grille on the front and top, finished in light gray or white. The design is modern and minimal, with a small brand logo and smooth, curved sides.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main vented grille and a small brand logo centered on the face.
description_view_1: Right side view reveals the smooth, slightly curved side panel and a small recessed cover at the bottom corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a solid, unvented back panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Left side view mirrors the right, with a smooth, curved surface and a small panel at the bottom.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, gray logo is centered on the front face, just below the grille.
attribute_grille_pattern: Rectangular grid pattern with evenly spaced horizontal and vertical slats on the front and top surfaces.
attribute_control_panel_location: Lower right corner of the side panel.
attribute_exhaust_vent_design: Multiple rectangular vents on the top surface, arranged in a grid pattern for upward airflow.
